summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new image-based exercise features. Backend API fully functional, frontend API integration working, but book editor UI has routing/rendering issues.

ui_bugs.issue: Book editor page fails to render when accessed via /edit/{id} route
ui_bugs.symptoms: White screen, hidden body element, no React components loading
ui_bugs.reproduction: Navigate to any book editor URL directly or from dashboard

passed_tests: All 11 exercise types present in API (/api/exercise-types)
4 image-based exercises correctly flagged (maze, coloring, differences, connect_dots)
Exercise generation API working for text exercises
Image generation working for maze and coloring exercises
Image exercises return base64 image data
Text exercises correctly have no image data
Backend API endpoints responding correctly (15/15 tests passed)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix book editor routing/rendering issue - book editor component not loading when navigating to /edit/{id} routes. This prevents testing of dropdown features and warning messages for image exercises.
success_percentage: Backend: 100%, Frontend: 70% (dashboard works, editor routing broken)
